THEPENITENT-BLACK_BENEDICTION_CARD.title: Black Benediction
THEPENITENT-ASHEN_EDICT_CARD.description: Whenever you [gold]Ascend[/gold], apply 1 [blue]Weak[/blue] to {AllEnemies:cond:>0?ALL enemies|a random enemy}.
THEPENITENT-ASHEN_EDICT_CARD.title: Ashen Edict
THEPENITENT-BLASPHEMOUS_BOLT_CARD.title: Blasphemous Bolt
THEPENITENT-BURDENED_REBUKE_CARD.title: Burdened Rebuke
THEPENITENT-CROWN_OF_THORNS_CARD.descrip: Gain {ThornsPower:diff()} Thorns. At the end of your turn, if you have [purple]Burden[/purple], gain that much [gold]Block[/gold]
THEPENITENT-CROWN_OF_THORNS_CARD.title: Crown of Thorns
THEPENITENT-CONFESS_CARD.title: Confess
THEPENITENT-CRISIS_OF_FAITH_CARD.outOfCo:
[purple]Descend[/purple] equal to your [gold]Faith[/gold].
Gain twice that much [gold]Block[/gold]{CalculationBase:cond:>0? + {CalculationBase:diff()}|}.
THEPENITENT-CRISIS_OF_FAITH_CARD.combatD:
[purple]Descend[/purple] equal to your faith ({DescendAmount} Faith).
Gain that much [gold]Block[/gold]. ({CalculatedBlock} Block)
THEPENITENT-CRISIS_OF_FAITH_CARD.title: Crisis of Faith
THEPENITENT-DARK_WHISPER_CARD.title: Dark Whisper
THEPENITENT-EMPTY_HANDS_CARD.title: Empty Hands
THEPENITENT-FALL_FROM_GRACE_CARD.outOfCo:
[purple]Descend[/purple] twice your [gold]Faith[/gold].
Deal that much damage{CalculationBase:cond:>0? + {CalculationBase:diff()}|}.
THEPENITENT-FALL_FROM_GRACE_CARD.title: Fall From Grace
THEPENITENT-FINAL_PENANCE_CARD.outOfComb:
Lose HP equal to half your [purple]Burden[/purple], rounded down.
Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to {ExtraDamage:diff()} times the HP lost.
[gold]Ascend[/gold] equal to your [purple]Burden[/purple].
THEPENITENT-FINAL_PENANCE_CARD.combatDes:
Lose {HpLossAmount} HP (half your [purple]Burden[/purple]).
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} that much damage to ALL enemies ({DamageAmount} each).
[gold]Ascend[/gold] {BurdenAmount} (equal to your Burden).
THEPENITENT-FINAL_PENANCE_CARD.title: Final Penance
THEPENITENT-GENTLE_MERCY_CARD.descriptio:
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
This healing does not generate [purple]Burden[/purple].
THEPENITENT-GENTLE_MERCY_CARD.title: Gentle Mercy
THEPENITENT-GRIM_UNCERTAINTY_CARD.descri: Whenever your [purple]Descend[/purple] creates [purple]Burden[/purple], deal {GrimCertaintyPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
THEPENITENT-GRIM_UNCERTAINTY_CARD.title: Grim Uncertainty
THEPENITENT-HEAVY_SOUL_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have [purple]Burden[/purple], deal {Damage:diff()} additional damage.
THEPENITENT-HEAVY_SOUL_CARD.title: Heavy Soul
THEPENITENT-HUMBLING_LITANY_CARD.descrip:
Enemy loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} Strength this turn.
Exhaust.
THEPENITENT-HUMBLING_LITANY_CARD.title: Humbling Litany
THEPENITENT-INTERCESSION_CARD.title: Intercession
THEPENITENT-LONE_VIGIL_CARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have no allies, [gold]Ascend[/gold] {FaithPower:diff()}.
THEPENITENT-LONE_VIGIL_CARD.title: Lone Vigil
THEPENITENT-MARTYRS_RESOLVE_CARD.title: Martyr's Resolve
THEPENITENT-MEND_WOUNDS_CARD.title: Mend Wounds
THEPENITENT-PRAYER_CARD.title: Prayer
THEPENITENT-RUINOUS_CONFESSION_CARD.outO:
[gold]Ascend[/gold] equal to your [purple]Burden[/purple].
Deal damage equal to {ExtraDamage:diff()} times the Ascended amount to ALL enemies.
THEPENITENT-RUINOUS_CONFESSION_CARD.comb:
[gold]Ascend[/gold] equal to your [purple]Burden[/purple] ({BurdenAmount}).
Deal that much damage ({DamageAmount}) to ALL enemies.
THEPENITENT-RITES_OF_ENDURANCE_CARD.desc: Whenever [gold]Faith[/gold] prevents damage, gain {RitesOfEndurancePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] next turn.
THEPENITENT-SACKCLOTH_CURSE_CARD.title: Sackcloth Curse
THEPENITENT-SCOURGING_BLOW_CARD.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have [purple]Burden[/purple], apply {WeakPower:diff()} [blue]Weak[/blue].
THEPENITENT-SCOURGING_BLOW_CARD.title: Scourging Blow
THEPENITENT-SHELTERING_PRAYER_CARD.title: Sheltering Prayer
THEPENITENT-STEADY_CONVICTION_CARD.title: Steady Conviction
THEPENITENT-ZEALOUS_RETORT_CARD.descript: Whenever [gold]Faith[/gold] prevents damage, deal {ZealousRetortPower:diff()} damage to the attacker.
THEPENITENT-ZEALOUS_RETORT_CARD.title: Zealous Retort
